Milkshake Mania Wiki
Play
Wiki / Controls & notation

Controls & number notation

Keyboard shortcuts for quick play, and the number-format options that control how those huge late-game figures are displayed.

Keyboard

Shortcuts

KeyAction
Space / EscPause & resume
Ctrl + SSave now
1 – 9Jump to a sidebar tab (unlocked ones)

On touch devices, everything works by tapping — tap the blender to blend, just like clicking on desktop. There's also an Auto-Blend toggle if you'd rather not click.

Music

Music player

The player sits in the bottom-right on desktop. It has its own keyboard shortcuts, an autoplay mode, a collapse toggle, and — new in v1.3 — a little toast whenever a fresh song starts.

KeyAction
PPlay / pause
[ / ]Previous / next track
, / .Seek back / forward 10s
MMute / unmute

Autoplay is a slider with four stops — Off, Periodic (a random song a few minutes after each ends), Frequent (shortly after), and Constant (back-to-back, no gaps). Turning autoplay on starts the music immediately. Prefer quiet? Set it to Off and the music stops after the current track.

Tight on space? Collapse the player with the chevron in its header — it folds down to a slim now-playing bar with a play/pause button, and remembers the choice. Volume and your autoplay mode persist across sessions too.

Developer

Dev Console

Enable Developer Mode in Settings → Danger Zone to unlock the command console. Press ` (backtick) or the floating ›_ Console button to open it. Commands never touch your money, XP, or progress.

CommandWhat it does
/helpList all commands with usage hints
/trigger <name>Fire a visual effect: fireworks, confetti, new-year, prestige
/notify <msg>Send yourself a test toast notification
/config <key> <value>Flip an option flag (e.g. /config devMode false)
/bg <name>Switch background by name (e.g. /bg lounge)
/theme <dark|light>Toggle the color theme
/tab <name>Jump to a sidebar tab by name
/scale <n>Set GUI scale (0.5–1.5, or 0 for Auto)
/dateShow the current in-game date
/infoShow save info (level, money, days played)
/versionPrint the game version
/saveTrigger an immediate save
/pause, /resumePause or resume the game tick
/clearClear the console log

Tab auto-completes the command you're typing — the first match is highlighted. Use ↑ / ↓ to scroll through your last 50 commands. Press Esc or backtick again to close.

Display

Number formats

Pick how large numbers are written in Settings → General.

FormatLooks like
Compact1.23K, 4.5M, 6.7B…
Compact (custom)1.23k, 4.5m, 6.7b… (lowercase)
Worded1.23 Million, 4.5 Billion (short scale)
Worded (European)Milliard, Billiard… (long scale)
Full digits1,234,567

The Help panel in-game includes a notation reference that updates to match whichever format you've chosen.

Settings & savesAll options GlossaryKey terms
